## Runtime.Session.ConfectionEditingSession.selectFillingIngredient() method

Selects a filling ingredient for a specific slot.

**Signature:**

```typescript
selectFillingIngredient(slotId: SlotId, ingredientId: IngredientId): Result<true>;
```
